name: Korg NTS-3 Kaoss
use: Real-time multi-FX, kaoss XY pad control, 4 simultaneous programmable effect modules
overview: DIY effects kit with 4 simultaneous effect modules (FX1–FX4). Each module's parameters are mapped to the kaoss touch pad (X/Y) and FX DEPTH control. Perform mode for live use; Effect Edit mode for parameter programming.
workflow: Connect audio to <kbd>AUDIO IN</kbd> jack; headphones/speaker to <kbd>AUDIO OUT</kbd>; USB-C for power
Tap <kbd>TEMPO</kbd> button 3+ times in time with music to set BPM (or hold TEMPO + turn knob)
Press <kbd>PERFORM</kbd> button → enter Perform mode; touch kaoss pad to apply FX
Press <kbd>FX1</kbd>–<kbd>FX4</kbd> to select which module you are controlling
Enter Effect Edit: hold <kbd>EDIT</kbd> + press <kbd>FX1–FX4</kbd> for that module
Turn knob to select parameter → press knob to confirm → turn knob to select target: X / Y / DEPTH / none
Press knob to confirm target → touch pad or turn <kbd>FX DEPTH</kbd> to set VALUE, MIN, MAX
Navigate to <kbd>CURVE</kbd> param → press knob → turn to choose Linear / Exp / Log / Toggle / MinClip / MaxClip
Press <kbd>MUTE</kbd> at any time to show current value in display without changing it
Save: press <kbd>EDIT</kbd> button → turn knob to select WRITE → press knob to confirm

shortcuts.action: Set BPM by tapping in time ★
Set BPM with knob
Set BPM via FX DEPTH control
Enter Perform mode (live FX) ★
Enter Program Edit mode
Enter Effect Edit mode for that specific module ★
Select parameter to edit
Confirm parameter → enter target assignment mode
Select target: X / Y / DEPTH / none
Confirm target → set value / min / max
Set parameter value in real time ★
Set parameter value (when ASSIGN=DEPTH)
Show current parameter value in display
Linear ramp from min to max
Exponential / logarithmic curve
Snap between min and max — pad becomes on/off switch ★
Bipolar mode — center = zero, edges = ±max
Select / activate effect modules ★
Mute wet signal — pass dry audio only ★
Real-time control of X/Y-assigned FX parameters
Real-time control of DEPTH-assigned parameter
Confirm changes / navigate

tips: Set MIN > MAX on any parameter: reverses the pad direction (right edge = minimum) — useful for reverse sweeps
CURVE=Toggle: pad becomes an instant on/off switch for any FX parameter — e.g. reverb freeze on/off
ASSIGN=none + VALUE=fixed: parameter locks to that value regardless of pad position — great for fixed resonance
Sync NTS-3 to NTS-1 mkII or volca via SYNC IN jack — tempo follows the master clock automatically
